---
name: ✨ Feature request
about: Suggest a new idea or enhancement for First-ADE repositories
title: 'feat: <short description>'
labels: ['enhancement']
assignees: ''
---

## 🎯 Problem Statement
Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe. (e.g., *I am always frustrated when...*)

## 💡 Proposed Solution
Describe the solution or feature you'd like to see added.

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## 🎨 Design Mockups (if applicable)
If your proposal affects the user interface or command-line outputs, provide mockups or examples here.

## 💡 Additional Context
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
